title: brain index verify — --json success output
description: Read-only SQLite ↔ LanceDB consistency check. Confirms that every note's SQLite-active generation (the notes.active_generation_id join key, fenced by the notes.active_generation counter) has matching live LanceDB chunks and that no note is served by a non-active or orphaned generation (retrieval-index-contract.md §2/§4). Reports divergences as data — it never repairs (that is `index repair`) and writes no ledger row — but, like every executed index operation (plan Task 3.5), it appends exactly one terminal run.projection git-ref audit event. Exit 0 when consistent, 1 on any divergence.

consistent.description: True when SQLite and LanceDB agree for every note (no divergence). MUST be true iff `divergences` is empty (enforced by the top-level conditionals).

divergences.description: One entry per inconsistent note; empty when consistent.

kind.description: The class of SQLite↔LanceDB inconsistency detected.

divergences.detail: active_generation_id has no live LanceDB chunks
live chunks tagged with a non-active generation

x-atlas-contract.summary: Read-only SQLite ↔ LanceDB consistency report; reports divergences, never repairs; emits exactly one terminal run.projection audit event.
sideEffects: emits exactly one run.projection git-ref audit event (executed index operation, plan Task 3.5)
prohibitedEffects: no more than one terminal run.projection event per run

errorCodes.when: the SQLite store file is missing or unopenable
the LanceDB index is not configured/present
one or more SQLite↔LanceDB divergences were found
